system: MFSA Connect Design System — Complete Elevation & Depth System
philosophy: Flat-with-shadow. Minimal elevation — cards and floating UI get shallow shadows with thin rings. No heavy box-shadows or extreme depth layering. The dominant elevation is shadow-sm with ring-1 ring-foreground/5 for cards, and shadow-md with ring-1 ring-foreground/10 for floating elements.

default_card.description: Standard card elevation: subtle shadow + thin outline ring

card_group.description: Lighter shadow for grouped/card-grid variants (SectionCards gradient cards)

hover_card.description: Cards that elevate on hover (used in landing page feature cards)

stats_card.classes: border-hairline bg-surface-card (no shadow, uses border instead)
stats_card.description: Dashboard stat cards use border-only styling instead of shadow

floating_ui_elevation.description: All dropdowns, popovers, dialogs, sheets, comboboxes, tooltips, and floating panels

tooltip.classes: bg-foreground text-background (inverted colors instead of shadow)
tooltip.description: Tooltips use inverted foreground/background instead of shadow for emphasis

sidebar_floating.description: Floating sidebar variant has minimal shadow

dialog_overlay.classes: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/20 duration-100 supports-backdrop-filter:backdrop-blur-sm
dialog_overlay.description: Dialogs use semi-transparent black overlay with optional backdrop blur

sheet_overlay.classes: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/20 duration-100 supports-backdrop-filter:backdrop-blur-sm
sheet_overlay.description: Sheets use identical overlay as dialogs

border_usage.card_border_alt: border border-hairline bg-surface-card (dashboard cards with border instead of shadow)
